svg.title: End-to-end lifecycle — order-triage AgentCore
svg.desc: Combined whole-lifecycle view of the order-triage AgentCore mono-repo, fusing all nine planes. TOP tributary (Build & deploy, B1-B6): the knowledge corpus (ontology · skills · KB docs) and mono-repo flow through path-filtered CI and the agent-build / stubs-release publishers, past the offline eval gate, into ECR + S3 artifacts, then a human-gated, OIDC-auth terraform apply. The apply provisions the MIDDLE runtime spine (Request track R1-R7): an Entra-authenticated analyst invokes the AgentCore Runtime (CUSTOM_JWT) on Nova Lite behind a Guardrail, with LOCAL knowledge tools, a Knowledge Base, and per-user short/long-term Memory, through the Cedar-guarded MCP Gateway out to the stub Lambdas (SigV4 for sap/orders, Entra-OBO for snowflake) and into Snowflake as the human under RLS. BOTTOM tributary (Observe): runtime telemetry lands in X-Ray + CloudWatch (dashboards, alarms, SLOs); AgentCore Online Evaluations grade the gen_ai spans and feed findings back to the corpus.
svg.text: One frame, two tracks: a Build & deploy track (B1-B6) ships a gated agent image into the runtime spine (Request track R1-R7); telemetry and online evals (grey) close the loop back to the knowledge corpus
